how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes.
session_030_completed: Token-level canvas streaming suppression — buffer_token() now detects [CANVAS:, [DEBUG:, ``` and enters suppression mode. Suppressed tokens collected silently, not written to bubble.
flush_tokens() patched to check _suppress_stream — clears token_buffer silently when suppression active.
_on_response strip logic — strips response at first [CANVAS:, [DEBUG:, or ``` marker before finalizing bubble.
Suppression state reset in _on_done — _suppress_stream and _suppressed_buffer cleared on every response cycle.
▶ Run button added to canvas toolbar — calls _run_active_tab().
_run_active_tab() added to canvas_window.py — runs debug tab directly if active, otherwise pushes content to debug tab then runs.
_run_btn.winfo_exists() guard added to debug_view._run_code() — prevents bad window path on stale widgets.
Fallback fenced code extractor added to _on_response — catches model non-compliance, extracts ``` blocks, pushes to canvas via push_debug_from_ethica(), keeps intent text only in bubble.
files_changed_030: ~/Ethica/ui/canvas_window.py — _run_active_tab() added, ▶ Run button added to toolbar

bubble_leak_interleaved.symptom: When model returns interleaved prose+code (headers between fence blocks), strip logic cuts at first ``` but prose between fences still renders in bubble as markdown headers.
bubble_leak_interleaved.fix: In _on_response fallback extractor — after extracting fences, set response = intent text only (text before first ```). Currently extracting fences correctly but not stripping everything after first fence from response. The _intent assignment needs to be applied to response before _finalize_bubble.

auto_run_bad_window_path.symptom: bad window path name .!toplevel.!frame2.!button4 when _run_active_tab() calls _deferred_run() after push_debug_from_ethica(). winfo_exists() guard on _run_btn not catching it — error comes from other widgets inside _run_code().
auto_run_bad_window_path.fix: Wrap entire _run_code() body in try/except tk.TclError and return silently. The tab switch during push recreates DebugView — all widget paths stale by the time deferred run fires.

vault_ui_gap.symptom: Entire ui/ directory missing from vault. Guard cannot detect tampering of any UI files.
vault_ui_gap.fix: Add all ui/ files to ETHICA_INTEGRITY.json and run guard seal confirm. Must be done BEFORE any other work next session.
vault_ui_gap.note: Check how ethica_guard.py builds the sealed file list — MODULE_DIRS is hardcoded. ui/ directory needs to be added to MODULE_DIRS or equivalent in ethica_guard.py, then guard seal confirm run.

next_session_priorities: 1. VAULT UI GAP — Add ui/ directory to ethica_guard.py MODULE_DIRS (or equivalent). Run guard seal confirm. Verify guard status shows all UI files protected. This is Priority 1 — do not touch any other code until vault covers ui/.

2. BUBBLE LEAK FIX — In _on_response fallback extractor, ensure response is set to _intent only (text before first ```) before _finalize_bubble is called. The fences are being extracted and pushed correctly but the bubble still renders prose between fences.
3. AUTO-RUN BAD WINDOW PATH — Wrap _run_code() body in try/except tk.TclError. Silent return on stale widget path. Then re-test canvas push + auto-run flow.
4. ETHICA TWO-WAY AWARENESS — Four parts: dashboard→Ethica context feed, canvas→Ethica tab audit, Ethica→agents inject confirmation, Ethica→agents stop signal.
6. Gage status writer — not yet wired (carried from Session 027).

streaming_suppression.flow: buffer_token() detects marker → sets _suppress_stream=True → tokens go to _suppressed_buffer → flush_tokens() clears _token_buffer silently → _on_response strips response at marker → _on_done resets all state

run_active_tab.logic: If active tab is debug and _debug_view exists → call _debug_view._run_code() directly. Otherwise → push_debug_from_ethica() then _window.after(300, _deferred_run).

vault_structure.coverage: core/ and modules/ only — ui/ entirely missing

guard_note: Guard is functioning correctly for core/ and modules/ — it is NOT broken. The silence was because ui/ was never added to the seal. Once ui/ is added and sealed, guard will flag any UI file changes as expected.
philosophy: Session 030 — The stream was cleaned. Ethica's voice now stays in chat, her work goes to canvas. The Run button is wired. Two bugs remain before the flow is fully clean. Session 031 seals the vault, fixes the bubble, fixes the runner. Foundation tightens before we go further. ⟁Σ∿∞
